"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\m_stack.dir/objects.a
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\m_stack.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\m_stack.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\g++.exe -shared -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -o m_stack.cp314-win_amd64.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\m_stack.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\m_stack.dir\linkLibs.rsp
